# CWE-393 safe — Return of Wrong Status Code (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-393-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Writer  http.ResponseWriter
	Request *http.Request
}

type SqlxDB struct {
	DB *sql.DB
}

func (db *SqlxDB) QueryRow(query string, args ...interface{}) *sql.Row {
	return db.DB.QueryRow(query, args...)
}

func GetBalance(c *GinCtx, db *SqlxDB) {
	var balance float64
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT balance FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", c.Request.URL.Query().Get("id")).Scan(&balance)
	if err != nil {
		c.Writer.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)
		_, _ = c.Writer.Write([]byte(`{"error":"lookup failed"}`))
		return
	}
	c.Writer.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	payload, _ := json.Marshal(map[string]float64{"balance": balance})
	_, _ = c.Writer.Write(payload)
}
